mheducation.com/highered   About the Authors

ZVI BODIE ALEX KANE ALAN J. MARCUS Boston University University of California, Boston College San Diego Zvi Bodie is the Norman and Alan Marcus is the Mario J. Adele Barron Professor of Alex Kane is professor of Gabelli Professor of Finance Management at Boston Uni- finance and economics at the in the Carroll School of Manversity. He holds a PhD from Graduate School of Interna- agement at Boston College. the Massachusetts Institute of tional Relations and Pacific He received his PhD in ecoTechnology and has served Studies at the University of nomics from MIT. Professor on the finance faculty at the California, San Diego. He Marcus has been a visiting Harvard Business School has been visiting professor professor at the Athens Laboand MIT’s Sloan School of at the Faculty of Economics, ratory of Business AdminManagement. Professor Bodie University of Tokyo; Graduate istration and at MIT’s Sloan has published widely on pen- School of Business, Harvard; School of Management and sion finance and investment Kennedy School of Govern- has served as a research assostrategy in leading profes- ment, Harvard; and research ciate at the National Bureau sional journals. In cooperation associate, National Bureau of Economic Research. Prowith the Research Foundation of Economic Research. An fessor Marcus has published of the CFA Institute, he has author of many articles in widely in the fields of capital recently produced a series of finance and management jour- markets and portfolio manageWebcasts and a monograph nals, Professor Kane’s research ment. His consulting work entitled The Future of Life is mainly in corporate finance, has ranged from new-product Cycle Saving and Investing. portfolio management, and development to provision of capital markets, most recently expert testimony in utility rate in the measurement of mar- proceedings. He also spent ket volatility and pricing of two years at the Federal Home options. Loan Mortgage Corporation (Freddie Mac), where he developed models of mortgage pricing and credit risk. He currently serves on the Research Foundation Advisory Board of the CFA Institute.
